positive: Minimalist, symmetrical illustration of a celestial fox spirit (kitsune) sitting gracefully amidst stylized constellations and cosmic nebulae. The fox should have striking, ethereal fur with an elegant silhouette and glowing eyes. Incorporate stylized elements of mythic floral patterns (like lotus or cherry blossom) weaving through the celestial body. Use a deep indigo and gold color palette with touches of glowing cyan and magenta. The composition must be highly centralized and balanced, suitable for a high-quality apparel print. Linework should be crisp and defined, with areas of solid color and gradients for depth. Studio lighting, concept art style, vector illustration quality.
negative: blurry, watermark, text, logo, poor anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, low resolution, grainy, noise, photographic, realistic, busy background, artifacts, bad composition
